_comment: Example config for worker.ps1. Copy to config.json in your ConfigDir and replace placeholder values.
_aksEdgeMsiUrlNote: Official aka.ms shortcut to the latest stable AKS Edge Essentials K3s MSI. Microsoft does not publish per-version aka.ms links, so to pin a specific version, host the MSI yourself and point this at it.
_authNote: Phase 3 authenticates with the Arc machine's system-assigned managed identity (az login --identity). Grant it Contributor on the resource group, or Kubernetes Cluster - Azure Arc Onboarding plus Tag Contributor for least privilege. No service principal is used.
_enableWorkloadIdentityNote: Default false matches the validated AIO baseline. Set true when downstream AIO components need workload-identity-backed secret sync. Activates Phase 3 OIDC issuer enablement, K3s apiserver patch, and Arc agent restart.
_scheduledTaskNameNote: Optional. Defaults to SiteOpsAksEeBootstrap when omitted. Set explicitly if you run multiple bootstraps in parallel on the same host (unusual).
_localAdminUserNote: Only used in dedicated-admin mode. By default the worker task runs as NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM and no account is created. With RunAsDedicatedAdmin the launcher creates this user (default siteops-bootstrap) with an on-box generated password, runs the task as it, and removes it in Phase 99.
